name: git-release-tag-squash-commit
default_program: [stages: preflight>act>verify>handoff | scope: branch(release) | policy: tag-source-only,deterministic-output | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: RELEASE_TAG
required_inputs.description: Tag to materialize as release branch squash snapshot.

required_inputs.name: REMOTE_NAME
required_inputs.description: Remote to push release branch. Default: origin.

required_inputs.name: CACHE_PATHS
required_inputs.description: Runtime/cache paths to remove before commit (for example .axiomsync, .axiomme).
